feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BAPI or FM to update Customer Bank details
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

This is too automate updating of Bank details in SAP for customer, Do we have any BAPI or FM to update or any other means to automate the updating process. I have already checked, but did not find any FM, in XD99 we can do a mass update, But I want to automate the process of updating.

Kindly help or suggest possible options

Thanks, Thiru

entry.title: CDS View for Planned Values & Actual Values
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts,

We are looking for a CDS View for our Customer Projects which would help us to get Planned Values and Actual Values subjected to all the projects we have. We tried using - "C_SlsPerfPlanActualQuery" but this CDS view is not yet released and again we are not able to derive this requirement. 

There is SAP Standard Analytical Query App which gives us the fields "Planned Revenue" and "Billed Revenue" which we can consider as "Planned Value and Actual Value". But we are trying create a report which would give the order backlog of these value (i.e Planned Value - Actual Value) and hence we cannot use this Standard report directly. 

If any community experts has more information or idea on this it would be helpful.

Thanks & Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Edit in the MIGO table?
entry.content: How to add the Material Code in the MIGO table? I want to know if it s possible or not ?

entry.title: Material Substitution in ORDRSP IDoc
entry.content:
Hi,

My requirement is, to substitute a material number in the SalesOrder with a new material. For all communication facing to the customer, we still want to use the old material number. 

I have created a substitution rule in TVSU with SUDRU activated. For printouts, the old material number is used. However, I also want the old material number to be used within Order Confirmation IDocs. 

E1EDP19 segment also seems to have the according qualifiers 008 and 009. 

However, no logic to fill them outbound is implemented. Any ideas if there is a possibility to activate this in SAP standard?

 

kind regards

Harry

entry.title: Sales order item contains a confirmed quantity and has an Embargo assigned
entry.content:
The expectation is, if a sales order item has an embargo block the confirmed quantity will be removed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: When using Idoc TXTRAW to send email from the system it is concatenating some of the lines together
entry.content: When using a task to convert and send an email from an inbound Idoc TXTRAW, the email that is sent concatenates some of the lines together. It doesn't show this way when you look at it in SOST. I have been able to duplicate it using the SAPOffice function SO00  that has a document class of RAW. I can copy and past the data from the TXTRAW and it produces the same email as is sent through the task. Is there a configuration that could be changed so the email is formatted correctly? Or a fix that can be applied?

entry.title: Missing handling unit (but the HU number shows up in the document flow)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I'm having this strange situation where I cannot access HU information from either the delivery document or via HU03.

 

When I try to access via "Display document" button in the document flow, I get no response.

When I try to access the HU information via HU03, I get "Handling units could not be found. Check for typing errors " message.

 

The HU number does show up in the document flow of this delivery document and since we have a change history which suggests that we have once packed items in this delivery document, the HU did exist in the past.

I'd appreciate it if you could tell me why this is occurring?

I'd also appreciate it if you could tell me if it's possible to access deleted handling units via some tables/transaction codes. I could not find this handling units in VEKP/VEPO tables. So I'm assuming that the information was deleted from those tables.

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Return order should contain original items only
entry.content:
Requirement: Restrict the addition of new material line items in Return Sales Order that was created with reference to an existing original Invoice. Restrict the increase in quantity of the original items.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SD - Passing Freight Line of $0.00 in tax call
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently, we're facing an issue where our sales documents that are free shipping do not pass a freight line in the tax call.  This only became an issue with the Colorado Retail Delivery Fee.  Normally, not passing a $0.00 wouldn't have been an issue, however now our Tax Engine doesn't return the $0.27 fee because there is no shipping indicator passed in the call.   When I test out adding a freight condition at $0.00 it just isn't included in the call.  Can passing a freight condition at $0.00, be determined in the Sales and Distro configuration?

entry.title: Contact Person Partner Function in sales order processing
entry.content:
Hello There,

Quick question I know we can assign multiple contact person on a sales order processing level.

There is a business requirement that for one customer multiple contact persons are allocated and each contact person can individually place an order from their home-grown ordering system, how this could be possible with SAP?

What's the role of this partner function CP(Contact Person), is it possible for contact person to create a sales order?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Special Delivery for item category
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We have a business requirement regarding delivery. I want to know if we can set up special delivery rules for item categories. For example:

ZTAN = Can only be delivered individually

ZTAN+TAN = System will throw an error

entry.title: SIC Code in Plant level
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community
I need to find the table/field of SIC code in a plant level. 
Similar to SIC Code for Item level which can be found in MVKE-MVGR1

Thank you

entry.title: How to maintain large number of entries in OVK2/OBAE transaction
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I've one requirement to maintain a large number(more than 4000 entries) of Country/Region entries in OVK2 and OBAE transaction. It is getting saved in a TR.

If anyone had similar requirement or having knowledge how this can be done, please let me know the possible methods to do the same.

Thanks,

Regards,

Akhil

SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Error while Creating Returns ZRE: Incompletion Log
entry.content:
Table VBUV for incompletion log at item levelHeader level error(Warning) related to TaxHello SAP Gurus,

I have a problem when creating a Consignment return delivery...the incomplete log which shows the following message:

Following data still needs to be completed

Item Missing data

10 Subtotal 6

10 CFOP

10 ICMS law

10 IPI law

10 Tax code

What should be done to solve this. 

Plz help.

entry.title: ATP Customizing Disappeared
entry.content:
Hi,

After an Upgrade with HANA 2022 some ATP Customizing Functions disappeared and i do not know where to find them. In older HANA Version you had the possibility to tick following options in this customizing step:

Sales- Basic Functions- Availability Check- Availability Check with ATP- Define Availability Check Group 

1. Total Sales

2. Total Deliver Reqs

3. Block with TrO Qties

4. no Pac.

5. Accumul.

6. RelChkPlan

Last 3 options can be found in the new (2022) customizing step Define Basic Availability Check Group Behavior but i cannot find customizing step for the first 3 options, they disappeared.

In the table TMVF are maintained- SM30 did not help.

entry.title: You can deactivate the VPRS (hide) by un-checking the DETERMINE THE COST in the item category VOV7
entry.content: You can deactivate the VPRS (hide) by un-checking the DETERMINE THE COST in the item category VOV7, By doing this does it just hide the cost on the pricing condition screen on the order from the user or does it remove the cost determination and any functionality that has in the order?

entry.title: Merging Customer & Vendor into single BP
entry.content:
Hello,

During CVI pre-conversion activity on ECC/ERP system, If we want to merge customers and vendors into single BP which are having same legal entity (address) then in customization path do we need to assign customer & vendor account group to the same BP Grouping? Not all customers & vendors from those account groups are eligible to merge into single BP.

Thank you

entry.title: Material memo text is no longer working in S4 HANA version
entry.content:
Hello,

We had configurated some Material memo texts which were pop up un VA01 when we created a new Sales Doc. with these materials. The points is we have migrated our systems to S4 Hana and since these functionality is not working, we have a mirror system as a copy of our previous system and there is still working. I have debugged it and the problem comes with this standard FM which no longer finds the text despite it exists in STXH table: 
this is where the problem comes from: I also saw that this FM have changed a lot in this newer version. 

and more concretely this select 

The only parameter which I could be suspecting is the language one:

the others are perfect.

But I'm unable to see why it is not finding the text related since I can see in the table the text we are looking for.

Any idea?

entry.title: VBRK-XBLNR field length
entry.content:
Hello All,

While creating the billing document through vf01, the XBLNR is generated as 14 digits instead of 12. How can I change the field length to 12 digits?

regards,

Vignesh

entry.title: Undelivery retour order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a return delivery for 6 hus. In practice, we see that only 5 pallets have been returned by our customer. We started processing the return delivery for the 5 hus which are returned. Therefore we do have a picking and packing status of B. The delivery quantity is grayed out and therefore the delivery quantity cannot be adjusted anymore.

I thought that this can be solved by unassigning the hus in the packing stage and then adjusting the quantity. However unassigning the hus is not possible as those are already picked. Do you have any tips/ suggestions on how to process an under-delivery for a return delivery while the delivery is already partially processed? Any help is much appreciated!
